blockers.summary: Direct fetch returns HTTP 999 and/or authwall placeholder metadata instead of profile metadata.
remediation: Use manual links[].metadata fields for rich cards.
blockers.plannedSupportNote: Authenticated session-based workaround is planned (coming soon).

blockers.summary: Direct fetch returns challenge pages (HTTP 403 / anti-bot) and browser automation is redirected to Cloudflare verification instead of profile metadata.
remediation: Use manual links[].metadata fields for rich cards.
Prefer authenticated extractor cache via links[].enrichment.authenticatedExtractor='medium-auth-browser' and run npm run setup:rich-auth.
blockers.plannedSupportNote: Authenticated extractor workaround is available via medium-auth-browser (RSS feed capture).

blockers.summary: Direct fetch returns HTTP 200 but no usable profile metadata (title, description, image).
remediation: Use manual links[].metadata fields for rich cards.
Prefer authenticated extractor cache via links[].enrichment.authenticatedExtractor='x-auth-browser' and run npm run setup:rich-auth.
blockers.plannedSupportNote: Authenticated extractor workaround is available via x-auth-browser (oEmbed + avatar capture).

blockers.summary: Direct fetch returns only generic Facebook metadata and omits required rich-card fields (description/image) for profile URLs.
remediation: Use manual links[].metadata fields for rich cards.
Prefer authenticated extractor cache via links[].enrichment.authenticatedExtractor='facebook-auth-browser' and run npm run setup:rich-auth.
blockers.plannedSupportNote: Authenticated extractor workaround is available via facebook-auth-browser (profile URL normalization + local cached image asset).
